block_01: Thank you for becoming a part of the Quadcode Markets community. Let us guide you through the platform at the beginning of your trading journey with us.
block_03: Download the application for your preferred device and get access to your investment portfolio and trading interface anytime, anywhere.
block_12: Make your first trades using a refillable virtual €10,000 demo balance. Test hypothesis with zero risks involved.
block_15: Passing this important step will provide you access to trading on a real account. The whole process will take a couple of minutes thanks to the automated verification flow.
block_18: When feeling confident enough to make a real investment, deposit as low as €20 and let your trading journey on the Quadcode Markets platform begin.
block_21: If you have any uncertainties, don't hesitate to reach out to our friendly Support team via Live Chat.
